candidate_causes: The guarded builder and inventory scripts executed against the expected Blender RNA interface.
interpretation: The repository has a functioning minimal Blender 5.0.1 structural evidence path.
discriminating_tests: Repeat on a fresh Windows checkout.
Run repository-independent CI checks on Windows and Linux.
confidence_basis: Three successful guarded Blender processes and schema-backed retained outputs.
confounders: The fixture is synthetic and trivial.
No visual render or proprietary asset was tested.
